caption: A large, semi-circular assembly hall is filled with numerous people seated in rows of tiered seating, facing a central podium and a large, textured green wall. The attendees are predominantly dressed in white clothing, with some wearing traditional attire and colorful scarves. In the background, several large screens display a distant view of the same assembly hall. At the front of the room, a small group of officials stands near a wooden desk and podium. As time progresses, the assembly remains largely stationary, though subtle movements occur among the crowd as some individuals shift in their seats or lean toward neighbors. The lighting remains consistent throughout the scene, illuminating the vast space and the structured arrangement of the seating, while the screens in the background continue to display the live feed of the proceedings.
